positive: Minimalist celestial scene, a lone, stylized mountain silhouette rendered in deep indigo and charcoal gray, framed by a swirling nebula of pale gold and cyan. Above the mountains, a perfect crescent moon and three geometrically spaced stars are depicted. The composition is highly symmetrical and centered. Style should evoke clean linework, woodcut engraving influence, and crisp vector art. Lighting is ethereal and dramatic, casting strong contrast between the dark foreground and the luminous sky. Ideal for screen printing on natural fabric.
